description: Build turnkey-composed, mount the repo at /firefly/turnkey or /tmp/turnkey-fuse-test, verify: ls shows root/ and external/ dirs, source files readable via root/, cell content accessible via external/, virtual .buckconfig present.

comments.text: Readdir works with null stat entries. getattr works for root. Child path getattr (/root, /external) returns ENOENT from NFS layer despite correct FUSE response. Investigating uid/gid and NFS permission model.

title: End-to-end test: mount turnkey repo via FUSE-T
